_note: Justified raw values in component CSS (ADR-0016 Decision 2, 'full strict'). check-contract.mjs reads this: each entry exempts ONE (file, prop, value) from the raw-value gate WITH a written reason. These are component-INTRINSIC geometry — concentric radii, hairline pads, icon clearances, thumb centering — not --uix-* contract-scale values; minting tokens for them would pollute the namespace. An unlisted raw value still FAILS the gate (Law 1). A stale entry (no longer present in the CSS) prints a cleanup warning. Match is on whitespace-normalized prop+value.

entries.why: Clearance for the absolutely-positioned leading icon (icon at left:10px + 20px glyph + gap). A component-intrinsic layout dimension, not a spacing-scale step.
Clearance for the absolutely-positioned trailing icon (mirror of the leading-icon clearance). Component-intrinsic layout dimension.
Hairline vertical pad on an inline label chip — 1px sits below the 4px space scale; the chip's height is set optically, this is a sub-scale nudge. Horizontal pad is already tokenized.
Hairline vertical pad on inline <code> — 1px is a sub-scale optical nudge below the 4px space scale. Horizontal pad is already tokenized.
Hairline vertical pad on a reaction pill — line-height:1.7 does the real vertical sizing; 1px is a sub-scale optical nudge. Horizontal pad is already tokenized.
Emoji-glyph display size in the reaction picker — sizing a pictographic glyph (icon-class), deliberately off the text type scale (which tops out at 40px display / bottoms at 11px eyebrow).
Concentric inner radius: option corner = container --uix-radius-md minus the 1px border + space-1 inset (~3px). A geometric relationship to the parent's radius, not an independent scale value.
Concentric inner radius for a pill tab (same construction as segmented): container --uix-radius-md minus the padding inset. Geometric relationship to the parent, not a scale value.
Pulls the enclosed tab down to overlap the container's 1px bottom border so the selected tab's border merges with it (the classic enclosed-tab border-collapse). Tied to the 1px border width.
Centers the 18px thumb on the 6px track: -(18 - 6) / 2 = -6px. Intrinsic to the thumb/track geometry; changing either dimension changes this.
1px optical nudge aligning the status icon with the title's cap height. Sub-scale hairline, below the 4px space scale.
